text: NEW: In the coming days, the U.S. military plans to board Iran-linked oil tankers and seize ships in international waters. Source: WSJ
🇺🇦 The man who carried out the shooting in Kiev was eliminated by law enforcement officers. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : The U.S. military is preparing to board Iran‑linked oil tankers and seize commercial ships in international waters, expanding its naval crackdown beyond the Middle East. The move will target “dark fleet” vessels carrying Iranian oil or arms, including those already outside the Persian Gulf. The announcement came as Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz completely closed and attacked several commercial vessels on Saturday. Iran also warned that no vessel of any type or nationality is permitted to transit the strait. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 An advisor to the IRGC commander, Sardar Naqdi, said Iran has many targets it has not yet struck that could change the outcome of the war. “We have the upper hand. We can stop production of over 15 million barrels of oil per day and shut it down for a year, but we did not want to cause too much disruption in the world,” he said. He added that Iran has not yet targeted the enemy’s information technology, artificial intelligence and oil production capabilities. “Their hands are under our axe. They say they will hit our power plants – if they hit our power plants, we will hit theirs.” @wfwitness

India Angry at Iran Over its Oil Tanker Hit in Hormuz Strait Indian-flagged oil tanker Sanmar Herald was attacked while crossing the strait. Crew are reportedly safe. The incident follows a brief reopening during which at least 8 vessels crossed, after a 50-day blockade. READ MORE

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s First Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref said Trump’s tweets are worthless and his policies are a mix of delusion and contradictory rhetoric. Iran’s response is not in words but in the “glory of the battlefield” – breaking the alleged naval blockade and a two‑ to three‑fold jump in oil exports are signs of Iran’s decisive victory. “The nation’s authority will not be harmed by delusional talk,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗第一副总统穆罕默德·礼萨·阿雷夫表示，特朗普的推文毫无价值，其政策是妄想与矛盾言论的混合体。伊朗的回应不在于言语，而在于“战场的荣耀”——打破所谓的海上封锁以及石油出口两到三倍的增长，都是伊朗取得决定性胜利的标志。他补充说：“国家的权威不会因妄想之谈而受损。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the United States is having “very good conversations” with Iran and that it is “working out very well." He claimed Iran “got a little cute” and tried to close the Strait again, but “they can’t blackmail us." He noted that Iran has no navy and no air force, and that many ships are now heading to Texas and Louisiana. “We’ll have some information by the end of the day,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国正在与伊朗进行“非常好的对话”，并且“进展非常顺利”。他声称伊朗“有点耍小聪明”，试图再次关闭海峡，但“他们无法勒索我们”。他指出，伊朗没有海军和空军，许多船只现在正前往德克萨斯州和路易斯安那州。“我们会在今天结束前得到一些消息，”他补充道。 @wfwitness

text: As Argentina’s economic crisis pushes food prices higher, donkey meat is starting to appear as a cheap alternative for some consumers. With beef becoming too expensive, many people first switched to chicken and pork, then to even cheaper foods like eggs. Now, a small but growing number are turning to donkey meat. Source: Brasil 247
text_zh: 随着阿根廷的经济危机推高食品价格，驴肉开始作为一些消费者的一种廉价替代品出现。由于牛肉变得太贵，许多人先是转向鸡肉和猪肉，然后转向鸡蛋等更便宜的食物。现在，一小部分但人数不断增加的人开始转向驴肉。来源：Brasil 247

text: Trump: We will be talking about Iran later—we have very good conversations going on. It’s working out very well.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们稍后会谈论伊朗——我们正在进行非常好的对话。进展非常顺利。
